title: Liebknecht Bridge - Quick Summary
items: **Liebknecht Bridge is one of Berlin's best free viewpoints:** the Berliner Dom, Humboldt Forum, Spree and TV Tower all line up from one crossing.
**The bridge sits between Alexanderplatz and Museum Island,** so most visitors pass it while walking between major sights.
**Its older imperial crossing was Kaiser-Wilhelm-Brücke,** part of a late 19th-century route into old Berlin.
**The name points to Karl Liebknecht,** the socialist revolutionary murdered in January 1919 with Rosa Luxemburg.
**The best photo is not just the Cathedral:** include the Spree, palace facade, tram lines or TV Tower to show Berlin's layers.
